title: Bump github.com/containers/storage from 1.15.1 to 1.15.2
body:
Bumps [github.com/containers/storage](https://github.com/containers/storage) from 1.15.1 to 1.15.2.
Release notes *Sourced from [github.com/containers/storage's releases](https://github.com/containers/storage/releases).* > ## v1.15.2 > chrootarchive: invokeUnpack: close pipe on all return paths > Fix possible runtime panic in Lgetxattr > Overlayfs has dropped support for skip_mount_home options > Fix compile on mipsel > revert golang.org/x/sys
Commits - [`98799f7`](https://github.com/containers/storage/commit/98799f7874192f4655c71fe285a76d46282949e6) Bump to v1.15.2 - [`ed1edc8`](https://github.com/containers/storage/commit/ed1edc8a14d926228f26bed1793ba37f7df5af6b) Merge pull request [#482](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/containers/storage/issues/482) from containers/dependabot/go_modules/github.com/klau... - [`26d075e`](https://github.com/containers/storage/commit/26d075e54b031fbb33ea53014f32280b7ef988f5) Merge pull request [#484](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/containers/storage/issues/484) from vrothberg/chrootarchive - [`046dbf9`](https://github.com/containers/storage/commit/046dbf97bdca98577eace3c4fb639636e850af51) Merge pull request [#483](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/containers/storage/issues/483) from saschagrunert/lgetxattr-panic - [`cd0656a`](https://github.com/containers/storage/commit/cd0656ad1ba6365577edd13e9fbc699a5ac018fb) Bump github.com/klauspost/compress from 1.9.3 to 1.9.4 - [`aca03d3`](https://github.com/containers/storage/commit/aca03d333c53b8aab861845a4820e52a7ee9b471) Fix possible runtime panic in Lgetxattr - [`0bba9c8`](https://github.com/containers/storage/commit/0bba9c858486edd2afba5f0ae4082170f8a033eb) Merge pull request [#480](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/containers/storage/issues/480) from rhatdan/skip - [`31b1ca9`](https://github.com/containers/storage/commit/31b1ca9b906b90f32ea0814b9696a59698dea0d3) Overlayfs has dropped support for skip_mount_home options - [`a588d24`](https://github.com/containers/storage/commit/a588d24d2ea71569d7e87aa138019c26e02d99d5) Merge pull request [#481](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/containers/storage/issues/481) from containers/dependabot/go_modules/github.com/Micr... - [`3cf3170`](https://github.com/containers/storage/commit/3cf31701faadb22234adef1d178e3cb286128da1) chrootarchive: invokeUnpack: close pipe on all return paths - Additional commits viewable in [compare view](https://github.com/containers/storage/compare/v1.15.1...v1.15.2)

[![Dependabot compatibility score](https://api.dependabot.com/badges/compatibility_score?dependency-name=github.com/containers/storage&package-manager=go_modules&previous-version=1.15.1&new-version=1.15.2)](https://dependabot.com/compatibility-score.html?dependency-name=github.com/containers/storage&package-manager=go_modules&previous-version=1.15.1&new-version=1.15.2) Dependabot will resolve any conflicts with this PR as long as you don't alter it yourself. You can also trigger a rebase manually by commenting `@dependabot rebase`. [//]: # (dependabot-automerge-start) [//]: # (dependabot-automerge-end) ---
Dependabot commands and options
You can trigger Dependabot actions by commenting on this PR: - `@dependabot rebase` will rebase this PR - `@dependabot recreate` will recreate this PR, overwriting any edits that have been made to it - `@dependabot merge` will merge this PR after your CI passes on it - `@dependabot squash and merge` will squash and merge this PR after your CI passes on it - `@dependabot cancel merge` will cancel a previously requested merge and block automerging - `@dependabot reopen` will reopen this PR if it is closed - `@dependabot close` will close this PR and stop Dependabot recreating it. You can achieve the same result by closing it manually - `@dependabot ignore this major version` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this major version (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore this minor version` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this minor version (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore this dependency` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this dependency (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot use these labels` will set the current labels as the default for future PRs for this repo and language - `@dependabot use these reviewers` will set the current reviewers as the default for future PRs for this repo and language - `@dependabot use these assignees` will set the current assignees as the default for future PRs for this repo and language - `@dependabot use this milestone` will set the current milestone as the default for future PRs for this repo and language - `@dependabot badge me` will comment on this PR with code to add a "Dependabot enabled" badge to your readme Additionally, you can set the following in your Dependabot [dashboard](https://app.dependabot.com): - Update frequency (including time of day and day of week) - Pull request limits (per update run and/or open at any time) - Out-of-range updates (receive only lockfile updates, if desired) - Security updates (receive only security updates, if desired)

comments.body: A quick note to self: Is the downgrade of x/sys ( https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/478 ) safe, and desirable?

Looks like this PR has been edited by someone other than Dependabot. That means Dependabot can't rebase it - sorry!

If you're happy for Dependabot to recreate it from scratch, overwriting any edits, you can request `@dependabot recreate`.
